## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Testing

- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] `go vet ./...`
- [ ] `gofmt -w ./...` (or confirm no formatting changes needed)
- [ ] `env GOTOOLCHAIN=go1.25.0 golangci-lint run --timeout=5m` (if available)

## Checklist

- [ ] Docs updated (if behavior, flags, config, or UX changed)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for non-trivial behavior
- [ ] Breaking changes called out clearly
